local_setup_divergence.notes: Used an isolated default-branch worktree and the exact Factory #326 contract commit merged into Factory main.

roadmap_reconciliation.notes: Release-delivery governance bootstrap for BicameralAI/bicameral-mcp; it does not publish, deploy, or claim a released version.

state_refinement.release_state: Atlas writes one pending release-unit / assigned status; the trusted default-branch workflow changes that same status to success or failure only after verifying the complete signed assignment receipt set and candidate ancestry.
states_deferred: Dev branch-protection enforcement remains deferred until the live status-to-receipt flow passes.
invariants: No canonical product lifecycle, authority, or persistence state changed.
Atlas cannot mark the assignment gate successful or authorize merge.
Candidate code cannot replace the default-branch resolver, pinned Factory verifier, public key, WIF identity, or verified-status publisher.
Assignment verification does not satisfy topology, main promotion, publication, deployment, served identity, or product acceptance.

rejected_or_collapsed_states: Collapsed owner-approved and receipt-verified display contexts into one release-unit / assigned check without collapsing their authority boundary.
Rejected ordinary dev advancement as assignment invalidation; the assigned base SHA is an ancestry floor and non-descendant rewrites fail closed.
minimization_review.rationale: One visible check with two distinct writers is the smallest honest PR surface: Atlas may only create pending state and trusted repository verification alone may resolve it.

domain_entity_candidates: None. Release Unit, Release Assignment, Version Staging Batch, and release-unit / assigned are Factory-owned release-control terms.
factory_learning_signals: A single visible PR gate can preserve split authority when each writer is restricted to a disjoint state transition.

validation_evidence.focused_tests: Nine resolver and workflow contract tests pass.
validation_evidence.syntax: Ruff, formatting, mypy, Python compilation, YAML parsing, and git diff whitespace validation pass.

end_of_session_capture.notes: Factory #326 supplies the one-context assignment gate, ancestry-floor verification, and cross-repository staging contract.

session: MCP single-context Atlas Release Assignment verifier bootstrap
